scripts.android:sync: npm run setup:android && cap sync android
scripts.ios:sync: npm run setup:ios && cap sync ios
scripts.android:open: npm run android:sync && cap open android
scripts.ios:open: npm run ios:sync && cap open ios
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:build:release: npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.ios:build:sim: npm run ios:sync && xcodebuild -workspace ios/App/App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 15' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.ios:archive: npm run ios:sync && xcodebuild -workspace ios/App/App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Release -sdk iphoneos -archivePath ios/App/build/NexusAI.xcarchive CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO archive
